mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as revenue FROM consumption_record WHERE consumption_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND status = 'completed'
AND store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalOrders, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as totalRevenue, COALESCE(AVG(total_amount), 0) as averageOrderValue, COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) as uniqueMembers FROM consumption_record WHERE consumption_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND status = 'completed'
AND store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consumption_record WHERE status = 'completed'
AND store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM consumption_record WHERE status = 'completed'
AND store_id = #{storeId}
